extension.description: Offizielle Visual Studio Code-Erweiterung für ForgeScript.
command.createConfig.title: Konfigurationsdatei erstellen (.forgevsc.json)
command.reloadFunctionMetadata.title: Funktionsmetadaten abrufen. Mit Vorsicht verwenden!
command.searchGuides.title: Leitfäden durchsuchen
command.reloadGuideMetadata.title: Refresh Guides
command.openGuide.title: Leitfaden öffnen
command.previewGuide.title: Leitfaden-Vorschau
command.favoriteGuide.title: Zu den Favoriten hinzufügen
command.unfavoriteGuide.title: Aus den Favoriten entfernen
command.createGuide.title: Leitfaden erstellen
command.openGuideExternal.title: Leitfaden öffnen (External)
command.openExtensionSettings.title: Erweiterungseinstellungen öffnen
view.guides.title: Leitfäden
view.guides.welcome:
Keine Leitfäden verfügbar.
[$(refresh) Reload Guides](command:forgevsc.reloadGuideMetadata)
[$(add) Leitfaden erstellen](command:forgevsc.createGuide)
config.global.enabledWorkspaces.descript: List of workspace names where ForgeVSC is enabled. Leave empty to enable the extension for all workspaces.
config.workspace.additionalPackages.desc: Additional packages/extensions to fetch metadata from. By default, installed Forge packages are detected automatically. This property is only needed if metadata fetching fails or you want to include extra packages.
config.workspace.customFunctionPaths.des: Path(s) to your custom functions folder(s). This is used to generate metadata and to provide full extension feature support for your custom functions.
The highlight color used for function dollar signs ($).
config.workspace.colors.function.semicol: The highlight color used for function semicolons (;).
config.workspace.colors.operators.negati: The highlight color used for the negation operator (!).
config.workspace.colors.operators.silent: The highlight color used for the silent operator (#).
The highlight color used for the count operator (@[x]).
config.workspace.colors.operators.countD: The highlight color used for the count operator delimiter (separator).
config.workspace.features.folding.descri: Whether folding for multi-line function contents should be enabled.
config.workspace.features.hoverInfo.desc: Whether hover info cards for functions and operators should be enabled.
config.workspace.features.suggestions.de: Whether suggestions for bracket placement should be enabled.
Whether signature help for function arguments should be enabled.
config.workspace.features.diagnostics.de: Whether diagnostics for function validation should be enabled.
config.workspace.features.autocompletion: Whether autocompletion for functions and arguments should be enabled.
